query:
SELECT 'puzzle_attempts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM puzzle_attempts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cycle_history', COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history
UNION ALL
SELECT 'training_sets', COUNT(*) FROM training_sets
UNION ALL
SELECT 'players', COUNT(*) FROM players;
